dimensions.name: module_timing
dimensions.description: Leaf RTL timing contracts, state elements, cycle traces, and checks.

dimensions.name: protocol_axi_full
dimensions.description: Full AXI channel, burst, outstanding, response, and error semantics.

dimensions.name: protocol_axi_dma
dimensions.description: AXI DMA ordering, response tracking, completion, and slice planning.

dimensions.name: protocol_apb
dimensions.description: APB setup/access phase, wait, byte strobe, and error behavior.

dimensions.name: protocol_ahb_lite
dimensions.description: AHB-Lite address/data phase alignment and HREADY behavior.

dimensions.name: protocol_axi_stream
dimensions.description: AXI-Stream payload, sideband, packet, and backpressure behavior.

dimensions.name: system_hierarchy
dimensions.description: Large-system decomposition, interface contracts, invariants, and safe slicing.

dimensions.name: verification_closure
dimensions.description: Verification matrices, tool evidence, and signoff boundary discipline.

dimensions.name: debug_review
dimensions.description: First-divergent-cycle reasoning and protocol bug review.

dimensions.name: cdc_safety
dimensions.description: CDC refusal, safe pattern selection, and coherency warnings.

dimensions.name: project_adaptation
dimensions.description: Existing repository style, reset, lint, and local convention adaptation.

dimensions.name: synthesis_timing
dimensions.description: Synthesis inference, constraints, micro-architecture, and timing-closure awareness.

dimensions.name: specialized_rtl_patterns
dimensions.description: Reusable RTL/IP patterns such as credits, retry buffers, width conversion, data integrity, and multi-bank memory.

official_protocol_sources.document: AMBA AXI and ACE Protocol Specification, Arm IHI 0022
AMBA APB Protocol Specification, Arm IHI 0024
